g.text: miso - Also known as q, this is the input of the serial stream into the ESP32

g.desc: miso - Also known as q, this is the input of the serial stream into the ESP32

g.text: mosi - Also known as d, this is the output of the serial stream from the ESP32

g.desc: mosi - Also known as d, this is the output of the serial stream from the ESP32

g.text: sclk - Clock signal. Each data bit is clocked out or in on the positive or negative edge of this signal

g.desc: sclk - Clock signal. Each data bit is clocked out or in on the positive or negative edge of this signal

g.text: quadwp - Write Protect signal. Only used for 4-bit (qio/qout) transactions.

g.desc: quadwp - Write Protect signal. Only used for 4-bit (qio/qout) transactions.

g.text: quadhd - Hold signal. Only used for 4-bit (qio/qout) transactions.

g.desc: quadhd - Hold signal. Only used for 4-bit (qio/qout) transactions.

g.text: KISET = 890 AΩ from the electrical characteristics table.

g.desc: KISET = 890 AΩ from the electrical characteristics table.

g.text: KTMR = 48 s/kΩ from the electrical characteristics table.

g.desc: KTMR = 48 s/kΩ from the electrical characteristics table.
